# Let's open and read the uploaded file
path = "/mnt/data/file-593wkuPcgoYU8DsHPf4Tu1-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:5000], len(raw)

import re, json, textwrap, sys, unicodedata

raw_path = "/mnt/data/file-593wkuPcgoYU8DsHPf4Tu1-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(raw_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()

# Utility: trim edges of allowed characters
trim_chars = ''.join([
    ' \t\r\n',
    '«»"\'',
    '()[]{}<>',
    '،؛:.,!؟…',
    'ـ'
])

def trim_edges(span_text):
    # Remove only from the left/right if those characters are in trim_chars
    start = 0
    end = len(span_text)
    while start < end and span_text[start] in trim_chars:
        start += 1
    while end > start and span_text[end-1] in trim_chars:
        end -= 1
    return span_text[start:end]

# Find Aya spans: text between { }
aya_spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\{([^{}]+)\}', raw):
    inner = m.group(1)
    span_text = trim_edges(inner)
    # compute start index of span within raw
    # start inside braces after trimming leading trim_chars if any
    inner_start_in_raw = m.start(1)
    # move forward while characters are in trim_chars
    s = inner_start_in_raw
    e = m.end(1)
    while s < e and raw[s] in trim_chars:
        s += 1
    ee = e
    while ee > s and raw[ee-1] in trim_chars:
        ee -= 1
    # assert
    assert raw[s:ee] == span_text
    aya_spans.append((s, ee, span_text))

# Find Hadith spans: text between quotes ". Use ASCII quotes in text.
hadith_spans = []
quote_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'"', raw)]
# pair them in order; if odd, last one is unmatched
pairs = []
i = 0
while i < len(quote_positions):
    start_q = quote_positions[i]
    if i+1 < len(quote_positions):
        end_q = quote_positions[i+1]
        pairs.append((start_q, end_q))
        i += 2
    else:
        # unmatched, take until end of string
        pairs.append((start_q, len(raw)))
        i += 1

for start_q, end_q in pairs:
    # inner string is from start_q+1 to end_q
    inner = raw[start_q+1:end_q]
    span_text = trim_edges(inner)
    # compute start index in raw for span_text
    s = start_q + 1
    e = end_q
    while s < e and raw[s] in trim_chars:
        s += 1
    while e > s and raw[e-1] in trim_chars:
        e -= 1
    # assert
    if s < e:
        assert raw[s:e] == span_text
        hadith_spans.append((s, e, span_text))
    else:
        # empty? skip
        pass

len(aya_spans), aya_spans, len(hadith_spans), hadith_spans[:3], hadith_spans[-3:]

# Verify that raw[s:e] equals the span, and check boundaries visually
def check_spans(spans, label):
    for idx, (s,e,txt) in enumerate(spans):
        ok = raw[s:e] == txt
        context = raw[max(0,s-10):min(len(raw),e+10)]
        print(label, idx+1, s, e, ok)
        print("Context:", context.replace('\n','\\n'))
        print("Span:", txt)
        print("---")

check_spans(aya_spans, "Aya")
check_spans(hadith_spans, "Hadith")

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":222,"span_end":421,"span_text":"وَكَذَلِكَ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ رُوحًا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِي مَا الْكِتَابُ وَلَا الْإِيمَانُ وَلَكِنْ جَعَلْنَاهُ تَفْمِيَةً عَلَى قَلْبِكَ وَمُصَدِّقًا لِذِكْرِنَا وَهُدًى لِلْمُتَّقِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":454,"span_end":593,"span_text":"وَإِنْ يَمُدُّوكَ عَلَى الْقَتْلِ ثَمَّ قَدْ يَمُدُّ اللَّهُ عِنْدَهُ مِنْ قَبْلُ وَلَيُدْخِلَنَّ الَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ غَلِيٍّ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":628,"span_end":685,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ هَذَا قَوْلُنَا لَمُبَيِّنٌ لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":735,"span_end":881,"span_text":"إِنَّما الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِيَّةِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِلسَّائِلِ نِعْمَةٌ أَوْ عَذَابٌ يَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ يُصَلِّي لَهُ أَوْ يُصَدِّقَهُ أَوْ يُزَكِّيهِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":931,"span_end":984,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَهَلَكَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1034,"span_end":1135,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1188,"span_end":1291,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1341,"span_end":1444,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1497,"span_end":1600,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1650,"span_end":1753,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ فَكَذَلِكَ الَّذِي أَخَذَ بِالنَفْسِ وَأَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1806,"span_end":1835,"span_text":"مَنْ أَخَذَ بِالْقُرْآنِ وَأَ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
